title: draba aizoides var. erioscapa
intro: Draba aizoides var. erioscapa, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass or Alpine Whitlow-grass, is a subspecies of the Draba aizoides plant, belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Draba aizoides var. erioscapa is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies in various parts of the world.
